protectedEditPaths.reason: web/src/generated/ is codegen output - run yarn api:codegen instead of editing by hand.
contracts/openapi/.build/ is build output - edit contracts/openapi/api.v1.yaml or run api:export.
node_modules is dependency output and must not be edited by the agent.
bin/ and obj/ are build outputs and must not be edited by the agent.
Secrets and local environment files must not be edited by the agent.
Local MCP config can contain secrets and machine paths; use .mcp.json.example for shared guidance.

blockedShellCommands.reason: Destructive delete blocked by harness - use targeted file edits.
Destructive git operation blocked - see user git safety rules.
web/ uses Yarn only - use yarn --cwd web install.
